label: CIS Safeguard 17.6
title: Define Mechanisms for Communicating During Incident Response

prose.en: Determine which primary and secondary mechanisms will be used to communicate and report during a security incident. Mechanisms can include phone calls, emails, secure chat, or notification letters. Keep in mind that certain mechanisms, such as emails, can be affected during a security incident. Review annually, or when significant enterprise changes occur that could impact this Safeguard.
Primary and secondary mechanisms used to communicate and report during a security incident are determined.
Mechanisms are reviewed annually, or when significant enterprise changes occur that could impact this Safeguard.

example.en:
Mechanisms can include phone calls, emails, secure chat, or notification letters.

Keep in mind that certain mechanisms, such as emails, can be affected during a security incident.
